name: chip
title: Chip
description: Removable metadata chip — same control-density recipe as Tag, colored by semantic state (default / active / error / caution). Not a toggle/select control.

background.description: Surface context for interaction-fill tokens when the chip sits on a non-default surface.

removable.description: When true (default), shows the trailing dismiss control.

removeLabel.description: Accessible remove action. Use `{label}` as the chip-label placeholder.

events.name: dsRemove
events.description: Fired when the remove button is clicked.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
